name: I was partly at fault in the forklift crash at work, will that kill my claim?
description: Workers' comp: full benefits; suits: reduced by your fault %—prove others more negligent.

mainEntity.name: I was partly at fault in the forklift crash at work, will that kill my claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Workers' comp: full benefits; suits: reduced by your fault %—prove others more negligent.
acceptedAnswer.description: **No, workers' comp pays regardless of your fault, but third-party suits reduce by your percentage under comparative negligence.** Utah/Idaho follow modified rules.[5] Key factors: Insurer may argue 50%+ fault bars recovery in suits; forklift cases often operator/employer liable.[1][3] Document their negligence like speeding or no training. Lawyer minimizes your fault share for fair award.
